'''Tani Ab'yla''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent.

A member of an unspecified [[Feline/Legends|felinoid]] species with brown hair and yellow eyes, she was a proficient [[Commando/Legends|commando]] and a skilled [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]]. She generally preferred to attack enemies with some form of [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]], and normally carried some sort of device which could generate a localized [[Electromagnetic pulse/Legends|electromagnetic pulse]]. She could sprint at double her normal speed for a short duration.

==Behind the scenes==
Tani Ab'yla was one of several units which were cut from ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' before the game's release. Her abilities were usurped by Kyle Katarn, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and the paired unit of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. The name of Tani Ab'yla's model is: "NI_TANI.ALO"
